name: kavio-ai
description: Author validated Kavio video templates from natural-language briefs.

interface.longDescription: Turn briefs into portable Kavio JSON compositions, then validate, inspect, preview, render, and adapt them for social exports with the local Kavio CLI workflow.
defaultPrompt: Create a Kavio video from my brief.
Repair and validate this Kavio JSON.
Adapt this composition for social exports.
